violations.text: Deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Cups were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (canned clams) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Deli meats, cheese and eggs was observed held at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Deli meat was observed with a date mark (6/3) which exceeds the 7 days. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

(Chemical) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Prep unit located in the front area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 60F. PIC called for service prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The condensate from the soda gun is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The ansul system in the kitchen area has an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last service was lacking. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and stand mixer have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The tile coving in the dish wash area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
